title: 2 U.S. Government Workers Among 4 Killed in Car Crash in Mexico
summary_full: Two of the victims were American and two were Mexican, the authorities in Chihuahua said. The accident took place on a treacherous mountain road.
summary_public: Two of the victims were American and two were Mexican, the authorities in Chihuahua said. The accident took place on a treacherous mountain road.
